attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.DISCOUNT_CODE, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.DISCOUNT_NAME, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.BASE_CATEGORY_NUMBER, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.BASE_CATEGORY_NAME, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.CREATED_BY, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.CREATION_DATE, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.START_DATE, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.END_DATE, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.DISCOUNT, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.STATUS, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.DISCOUNT_PATTERN, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.CPA_CODE, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.DISCOUNT_IS_FOR, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF,
 (
 select DISCOUNT_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF
 minus
 select DISCOUNT_CODE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.XXITM_BASE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.DISCOUNT_CODE = STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.DISCOUNT_CODE  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXITM_BSE_CATEGORY_DISC_IF)
